briefdescription.para: This function converts XDc_VideoFormat enum to string name.
This function displays the resolution help menu.
This function displays the format help menu.
This function displays all supported non-live input formats.
This function displays all supported live output formats.
This function displays the main help menu.
This function displays the current configuration.
This function gets width from user.
This function gets height from user.
This function configures resolution.
This function configures format.

parameterdescription.para: - Name of the format being configured

briefdescription.para: This function configures output format (live stream)

parameterdescription.para: - Name of the format being configured

simplesect.para: This is specialized for live output formats

briefdescription.para: This function configures cursor parameters (coordinates and size)
This function configures partial plane blend parameters.
This function configures DP link parameters (lane count and link rate)
This function runs the interactive menu loop.
Reads a hex value from UART input, terminated by Enter.

detaileddescription.para: Accepts 0-9, a-f, A-F. Supports backspace. Optional "0x" prefix is skipped.

briefdescription.para: AUX Read/Write submenu.

detaileddescription.para: Allows the user to perform DPCD AUX read and write transactions with configurable address, data, and iteration count.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the initialized XMmiDp instance

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the InitRunConfig with default values.
This file contains menu implementation for configuration.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Initial version with InitRunConfig support
